no malicious behavior.\n- **Scores:** Malware 0, securityRisk 0 — consistent and justified.\n- **Conclusion:** Correct.\n\n---\n\n### Summary & Recommendations:\n- **Malware score:** All reports correctly assign 0, as there is no malicious code.\n- **Obfuscated score:** All 0, no obfuscation present.\n- **Risk score:** Most reports assign 0, except report 4, which assigns 0.1. Given the static, non-executing nature of the code, a risk score of 0 is appropriate.\n\n### Final assessment:\n- The code is a standard, autogenerated contract factory with no malicious intent.\n- The only minor inconsistency is the security risk score in report 4, which should be lowered to 0.\n\n---\n\n### **My own estimates:**\n- **Malware:** 0\n- **Obfuscated:** 0\n- **Risk:** 0\n\n**Reasoning:** The code is purely for contract interaction, with no dynamic or suspicious behavior.
